skill.name: seedance
skill.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "generate video prompts", "create Seedance prompts", "write video descriptions", mentions "Seedance", "seedance", "即梦", "即梦平台", "视频提示词", "视频生成", "AI视频", "短剧", "广告视频", "视频延长", or discusses video prompt engineering, AI video generation, or Seedance 2.0 workflows.
skill.summary: AI video prompt engineering skill for ByteDance Seedance 2.0 platform
skill.author: songguoxs

security_audit.summary: All 103 static findings are false positives. The scanner detected Ruby backtick syntax and cryptographic algorithms in what is actually a markdown documentation file containing video prompt examples in Chinese. The '@' symbols are reference syntax for the Seedance platform, not code execution. No actual security risks found.

critical_findings.title: False Positive: Ruby Backtick Detection
critical_findings.description: Scanner detected 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' at multiple lines (33, 52-54, 59-63, etc.). These are actually '@' reference symbols (@图片1, @视频1) for the Seedance AI video platform. This is legitimate documentation content, not code execution.
critical_findings.confidence_reasoning: The '@' symbols are Seedance platform reference syntax, not Ruby code. The entire file is a markdown documentation file.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
high_findings.description: Scanner reported 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at SKILL.md:3. Line 3 contains YAML frontmatter with skill description text. No cryptographic code exists.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: YAML frontmatter contains only text description, no cryptographic algorithms.

high_findings.title: False Positive: High Entropy Obfuscation
high_findings.description: Scanner reported 'very high entropy string' at SKILL.md:261 and 'high file entropy' at SKILL.md:1. These are Chinese video prompt text examples, not encoded payloads. Multilingual text naturally has higher entropy.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The content is Chinese language video prompts, not obfuscated code. High entropy is expected for non-English UTF-8 text.

content.value_statement: Users struggle to write effective prompts for ByteDance Seedance 2.0 AI video generation. This skill provides structured prompt templates, best practices, and examples for creating high-quality video prompts in Chinese.
actual_capabilities: Generate structured video prompts for Seedance 2.0 platform in Chinese
Provide 10 different prompt patterns for various use cases (text-only, reference images, video reference, audio reference)
Offer advanced techniques like timestamp storyboarding and technical parameter specification
Create multi-segment prompts for videos longer than 15 seconds using video extension
Supply vocabulary libraries for camera movements, lighting, and visual styles
limitations: Does not interact with Seedance API - only generates text prompts
Cannot verify if generated prompts produce expected results on the platform
Only supports Chinese language prompts (as required by Seedance platform)
Does not generate images or videos directly

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Generate promotional videos for products like cosmetics, electronics, or fashion items using reference images and commercial filming techniques.

use_cases.title: AI Short Drama Creation
use_cases.description: Create dramatic short videos with character consistency, dialogue, and emotional storytelling for social media or entertainment content.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media influencers

use_cases.title: Fantasy and Martial Arts Scenes
use_cases.description: Generate fantasy or martial arts action scenes with special effects, choreography, and cinematic camera work.
use_cases.target_user: Video enthusiasts and fan content creators

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text-Only Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [duration]-second video of [subject] doing [action sequence] in [environment] with [lighting] and [camera movement]. Style: [visual style].
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate a simple video from text description only, no reference materials

prompt_templates.title: Image Reference Video
prompt_templates.prompt: [Character reference]@图片1 as the main subject, [action description], background参考@图片2, camera movement: [lens motion], lighting: [light setup]
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate video using reference images for character or product consistency

prompt_templates.title: Video Extension
prompt_templates.prompt: 将@视频1延长[X]秒。[detailed description of new content in timestamp format: 1-[X]秒: description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Extend an existing video with new content, maintaining visual continuity

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Segment Long Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [total duration]-second video in [N] segments. Segment 1 (0-15s): [description]. Segment 2 (15-30s): [description using video extension format]
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate videos longer than 15 seconds using分段拼接 strategy

output_examples.input: Generate a 15-second martial arts battle scene
output_examples.output:
## 视频提示词

**主题**：仙侠战斗镜头
**时长**：15秒
**比例**：2.35:1

### 提示词

15秒仙侠高燃战斗镜头，金红暖色调，0-5秒：低角度特写主角蓝袍衣摆被热浪吹得猎猎飘动，双手紧握雷纹巨剑，剑刃赤红电光持续爆闪，地面熔岩翻涌冒泡；6-10秒：环绕摇镜快切，主角旋身挥剑，剑刃撕裂空气迸射红色冲击波，前排魔兵被击飞碎裂成灰烬；11-15秒：仰拍拉远定格慢放，主角跃起腾空，剑刃凝聚巨型雷光电弧劈向魔兵群。

音效：剑鸣、熔岩咕嘟声、魔兵惨嚎

output_examples.input: Create a product advertisement for a handbag
output_examples.output:
## 视频提示词

**主题**：奢侈品手包商业展示
**时长**：10秒
**比例**：9:16

### 提示词

对@图片2的包包进行商业化摄像展示，包包的侧面参考@图片1，包包的表面材质参考@图片3，要求将包包的细节均有所展示，背景音恢宏大气。

### 素材准备
- @图片1：包包侧面图
- @图片2：包包正面图
- @图片3：材质细节图

best_practices: Use timestamp storyboarding (时间戳分镜法) for videos longer than 10 seconds to precisely control each segment
Always specify the @ reference number clearly for each image, video, or audio file and explain its purpose in the prompt
Separate dialogue and sound effects from visual descriptions for clearer instructions to the model
anti_patterns: Do not use English prompts - Seedance requires Chinese language prompts for best results
Avoid uploading realistic human face images - the platform blocks these automatically
Do not forget to specify the duration for video extension prompts (the extension duration, not total length)

faq.question: What is Seedance?
faq.answer: Seedance is ByteDance's AI video generation platform (即梦). It supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and video extension capabilities.

faq.question: Can I generate videos in English?
faq.answer: Seedance works best with Chinese prompts. The skill generates Chinese prompts as required by the platform.

faq.question: How long can the generated videos be?
faq.answer: Single generation supports 4-15 seconds. For longer videos, use the分段拼接 (segment stitching) strategy with video extension.

faq.question: Can I use reference images of real people?
faq.answer: No. Seedance blocks uploads containing realistic human faces. Use illustrations, anime characters, or product images instead.

faq.question: What does the @ symbol mean in prompts?
faq.answer: @图片N, @视频N, @音频N are reference syntax to link uploaded materials in the prompt. For example, @图片1 refers to the first uploaded image.

faq.question: How do I create consistent character appearance across frames?
faq.answer: Use the same reference image (@图片N) for the character in both start and end frames, and mention it explicitly in your prompt.
